problem.summary: Teach warp-level reduction, inclusive scan, and vote masks with a shared-memory block baseline and shuffle/vote optimized path.
outputs: one sum and one predicate mask per warp-sized group
one inclusive scan value per input element
constraints: Masks must use active-lane aware intrinsics for ragged future variants
Compare against hipCUB/rocPRIM/hipCUB/rocThrust before production claims

verification.method: CPU reference computes per-group sum, inclusive scan values, and predicate ballot mask.

curation.notes: This task is an educational low-level primitive scaffold, not a replacement for hipCUB without measured evidence.
